items.raw_excerpt: A new book launched in Chennai explores friendship and well-being among youth in the AI era, highlighting loneliness and emotional connections.
items.summary_en: A new book about friendship and well-being for young people in the AI age was launched in Chennai. It talks about growing loneliness and the need for emotional connections in a tech-driven world.
items.summary_ko: AI 시대 청년들의 우정과 웰빙에 관한 신간이 첸나이에서 출간됐다. 이 책은 기술 중심 세상에서 커져가는 외로움과 정서적 연결의 필요성을 이야기한다.
items.title_en: Book on friendships in the AI age launched in Chennai
items.title_ko: AI 시대 친구 관계와 웰빙 조명한 책, 첸나이서 출간
items.title_original: Book on friendships amid AI era launched in Chennai

items.raw_excerpt: Oaxaca de Juárez, Oax., 29 de junio de 2026.- Derivado de la coordinación inmediata de las instituciones de seguridad que integran el Mando Metropolitano,
items.summary_en: Security forces in Oaxaca arrested a man accused of violently stealing a motorcycle in Pueblo Nuevo. The suspect was handed over to the Public Prosecutor's Office. The arrest was the result of coordination between agencies of the Metropolitan Command.
items.summary_ko: 오아하카주 푸에블로 누에보에서 오토바이를 폭력으로 강탈한 용의자가 메트로폴리탄 사령부 보안군에 의해 체포됐다. 용의자는 검찰청에 인계됐다. 이번 체포는 메트로폴리탄 사령부 소속 기관들의 즉각적인 공조로 이루어졌다.
items.title_en: Metropolitan Command arrests suspect for motorcycle robbery in Pueblo Nuevo, Oaxaca
items.title_ko: 오아하카 푸에블로 누에보에서 오토바이 강도 용의자 체포
items.title_original: Detiene Mando Metropolitano a presunto responsable de robo con violencia de una motocicleta en Pueblo Nuevo, queda a disposición del Ministerio Público: Fiscalía de Oaxaca - pagina3.mx

items.raw_excerpt: Women are taking up golf nearly twice as fast as men, with junior golfers like Rianna Hills one of many young people giving the sport a huge participation boost.
items.summary_en: Women are taking up golf nearly twice as fast as men. Junior golfers like 8-year-old Rianna Hills are giving the sport a huge participation boost.
items.summary_ko: 여성들의 골프 참여율이 남성보다 거의 두 배 빠르게 증가하고 있습니다. 8세 리아나 힐스 같은 주니어 골퍼들이 이 스포츠의 참여율을 크게 끌어올리고 있습니다.
items.title_en: An 8-year-old girl is helping boost golf numbers among women and girls
items.title_ko: 8세 소녀가 골프 인기 견인... 여성 골퍼 증가세 두드러져
items.title_original: This 8yo is one of many girls and young women driving golf numbers up

items.raw_excerpt: A NSW Police officer has admitted to unlawfully accessing the force's internal database to locate details about a domestic violence complaint against his friend.
items.summary_en: A NSW Police sergeant secretly looked up the force's internal database to find details about a domestic violence complaint against his friend. He has admitted to the unlawful access.
items.summary_ko: NSW 경찰 경사가 가정폭력 고소를 당한 친구를 위해 경찰 내부 데이터베이스에 불법 접속한 사실을 시인했다. 그는 경찰 전산망에 몰래 접속해 관련 정보를 찾아본 혐의를 받는다.
items.title_en: Police sergeant illegally accessed database for friend accused of domestic violence
items.title_ko: 경찰 경사, 가정폭력 고소당한 친구 위해 내부 데이터베이스 불법 조회
items.title_original: 'Snuck a look': Police sergeant accessed database for DV-accused mate

items.raw_excerpt: Activities for Canada Day at LeBreton Flats Park and elsewhere in Ottawa have been suspended until further notice due to inclement weather, according to the Canadian Heritage department, as heavy rain causes flooding and road closures.
items.summary_en: Heavy rain has caused flooding and road closures in Ottawa. Canada Day activities at LeBreton Flats Park and other locations are suspended until further notice.
items.summary_ko: 오타와에 폭우가 쏟아져 홍수와 도로 통제가 발생했다. 르브레통 플랫 공원 등 곳곳에서 예정됐던 캐나다데이 행사가 추후 공지 때까지 전면 중단됐다.
items.title_en: Canada Day events in Ottawa canceled due to heavy rain and flooding
items.title_ko: 폭우와 홍수로 오타와 캐나다데이 행사 전면 중단
items.title_original: Canada Day activities in Ottawa suspended as heavy rain causes flooding, road closures
